title: breynia oblongifolia
intro: Breynia oblongifolia, also known as the Black-eyed Susan or Dillenia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Phyllanthaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Breynia oblongifolia include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide relief from digestive problems. The plant can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
